claudeConfigDirPatcher.error.comment: Sent only when VS Code telemetry is enabled, this extension's error analytics setting is enabled, and an activation or command error occurs.

source.comment: The extension operation that failed, for example startup.autoPatch or command.apply.

error_name.comment: The JavaScript error name after redaction.

exception.comment: The redacted exception message and stack. Home directory paths are replaced before sending.

release.comment: The extension package name and version.

environment.comment: Whether the extension is running in production, development, or test mode.

vscode_ui_kind.comment: Whether VS Code is running on desktop or web.

vscode_remote_name.comment: The VS Code remote kind, or none when not connected to a remote extension host.

runtime.comment: VS Code and Node.js version metadata.

target_extension_version.comment: The installed Anthropic Claude Code extension version, or not-installed.

target_source_sha256.comment: A short SHA-256 prefix of the target extension.js file used to correlate unrecognized Claude Code builds without sending source contents.

target_extension.comment: Target extension id, installed flag, version, activation state, and redacted extension path.

patch_target.comment: Redacted target file path, backup presence, target source length, and short target source hash.

patch_status.comment: Boolean patch-point analysis for environmentVariables propagation and IDE path handling.
